get.description: Returns a single workflow blueprint. When no version options are specified, the latest version is returned.

Returns a single workflow definition using the specified workflow definition ID and version options.
Returns a single workflow definition using the specified workflow definition version ID.

get.summary: Returns a list of workflow definitions for the specified ids.
get.description: Returns a list of workflow definition summaries. When no version options are specified, the latest versions are returned.

post.summary: Creates a new workflow definition or updates an existing one.
post.description: Creates a new workflow definition or updates an existing one. If the workflow already exists, a new draft is created and updated with the specified values. Use the Publish field to automatically publish the workflow.

post.summary: Imports a JSON file into the specified workflow definition.
post.description: Imports a JSON file into the specified workflow definition.

get.summary: Returns all available workflow storage providers.

get.description: Returns a list of available workflow organizational.

post.summary: Creates a new workflow organizational or updates an existing one.
post.description: Creates a new workflow organizational or updates an existing one. If the workflow already exists, a new draft is created and updated with the specified values. Use the Publish field to automatically publish the workflow.

get.summary: Returns a list of workflow blueprints.
get.description: Returns paginated a list of workflow blueprints. When no version options are specified, the latest version is returned.

get.summary: Returns a list of workflow instances.
get.description: Returns paginated a list of workflow instances.
